command: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -c "import subprocess; patterns=['runtime_hooks/*.py','runtime_hooks/core/*.py','runtime_hooks/adapters/*.py','runtime_hooks/adapters/*/*.py','templates/*.yaml']; units=set(); [units.update(subprocess.run(['git','ls-files',p],capture_output=True,text=True,check=True).stdout.strip().splitlines()) for p in patterns]; units.update(['governance/copilot-instructions-template.md','examples/multi-validator-contract/AGENTS.md']); doc=open('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-manifest-2026-07-11.md',encoding='utf-8').read(); appendix=doc.split('## Appendix: Frozen Unit List (33 paths, verbatim)\n',1)[1]; listed={line[3:-1] for line in appendix.splitlines() if line.startswith('- ') and line.endswith('')}; assert units==listed, (units-listed,listed-units); adapter_units=[u for u in units if u.startswith('runtime_hooks/adapters/')]; assert all(f'| {u} |' in doc for u in adapter_units), adapter_units; assert 'raw receipt artifacts are not retained' in doc; assert '{pre,post,normalize}' not in doc; print('33 units exact; every adapter has an individual row; evidence-retention boundary present')"
